suspected_root_causes: Combustion deposit buildup, heat range mismatch, fuel trim issue, maintenance interval too long
recommended_tests: Check plug condition, coil output, injector balance, fuel trims, compression, service interval gap

suspected_root_causes: Soot accumulation, duty cycle, cooler restriction, actuator wear, calibration issue
recommended_tests: EGR position command vs actual, cooler delta pressure, soot inspection, regen history

suspected_root_causes: Actuator response lag, boost leak, sensor drift, vane sticking, calibration error
recommended_tests: Boost leak test, VGT command/actual trace, actuator calibration, intake restriction check

suspected_root_causes: Harness routing issue, connector sealing weakness, road spray ingress, bracket chafe point
recommended_tests: Harness visual inspection, wiggle test, connector seal inspection, oscilloscope signal check

suspected_root_causes: Low exhaust temperature duty cycle, DEF quality, nozzle blockage, crystallization buildup
recommended_tests: Doser spray test, DEF quality test, SCR temp profile, route/duty cycle analysis

suspected_root_causes: Catalyst aging, prior misfire damage, oxygen sensor drift, rich/lean fuel control issue
recommended_tests: O2 sensor switching test, fuel trim analysis, misfire history check, catalyst temperature test
